features.featureTitle: In PreOrderForm.tsx, update the Desi Mango 10 kg box variant price to ₹350 per box. Update the dynamic total price calculation so that when 'Desi Mango' is selected with '10 kg box' packaging, the price used is ₹350 per box × quantity. Update the pre-filled WhatsApp message to reflect ₹350 per box for Desi Mango 10 kg box orders. The Desi Mango 5 kg box (₹200 per box), Kesar Mango 5 kg box, and Kesar Mango 10 kg box pricing must remain unchanged.
